identity.vocalStyle: breathy Latin male lead paired with sweet soulful Filipino female counterpoint
identity.styleSentence: A sultry theatrical cabaret-R&B duet at 118 BPM featuring male/female back-and-forth vocals over a warm trip-hop groove with dark lounge piano, brushed drums, and smoky synth pads that creates an intimate island-night atmosphere.
identity.summary: A sultry, late-night R&B duet exploring romantic uncertainty in a long-distance relationship through text messages and intimate phone calls.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing smartphone screen illuminating a dark room at midnight, casting blue light on dust motes dancing in the air.
Finger hovering over an 'X' button to delete a typed message, thumb trembling slightly against glass.
Tiny golden embers falling slowly into deep shadows within a smoky lounge setting.
Subsonic waves rippling through the floorboards of a dimly lit room, causing heavy objects to sway gently.
Soft clouds forming shapes of silhouettes in a twilight sky above a city skyline at night.
Empty hands reaching out through transparent blue glass partitions towards warm light on the other side.
